turns.question: Alright, I'll talk to you soon, take care!
Okay, I'm gonna let you go, thanks for calling.
turns.answer: No problem, thanks for picking up, means a lot.
turns.answerKo: 괜찮아, 받아줘서 고마워, 큰 힘이 됐어.

turns.question: Of course. I should let you get back to your day now, talk soon.
turns.questionKo: 당연하지. 이제 하던 일 계속하게 놔줄게, 곧 얘기하자.
turns.answer: Sounds good, talk soon, take care of yourself.
turns.answerKo: 좋아, 곧 얘기하자, 몸 잘 챙겨.

turns.question: You too. Okay, until next time, stay in touch, alright?
turns.questionKo: 너도. 그래, 다음에 또 얘기할 때까지, 연락 계속하자, 알았지?
turns.answer: Will do, you too, take care of yourself out there.
turns.answerKo: 그럴게, 너도, 거기서 몸 잘 챙기고 있어.

turns.question: I should get going, this call's been really great though.
turns.questionKo: 나 이제 가봐야 하는데, 이번 통화 정말 좋았어.
turns.answer: Agreed, let's talk again soon, I mean it.

turns.question: For sure. I better let you go, it's getting late over there.
turns.questionKo: 그래. 이제 끊어야겠다, 거기 시간 늦었을 텐데.
turns.answer: Yeah, it kind of is, but thanks for calling tonight.
turns.answerKo: 응, 좀 늦긴 했는데, 오늘 밤 전화해줘서 고마워.

turns.question: Of course. Okay, stay safe out there, love you, bye.
turns.questionKo: 당연하지. 그래, 거기서 몸 조심하고, 사랑해, 안녕.

turns.question: Alright, I've got to run, but let's plan a real visit soon, okay?
turns.questionKo: 자, 나 가봐야 하는데, 조만간 진짜 만나러 갈 계획 짜보자, 알았지?
turns.answer: Definitely, I'd love that, take care until then.
turns.answerKo: 당연하지, 나도 좋아, 그때까지 잘 지내.

turns.question: I should probably go, but I'm really glad we caught up tonight.
turns.questionKo: 이제 가야 할 것 같은데, 오늘 밤 이렇게 얘기 나눠서 정말 좋았어.
turns.answer: Me too, let's not wait months to talk again.
turns.answerKo: 나도 그래, 다음엔 몇 달씩 기다리지 말자.

turns.question: Agreed. Okay, take care until we see each other again.
turns.questionKo: 맞아. 그래, 우리 다시 만날 때까지 잘 지내.
turns.answer: You too, honestly can't wait for that.

turns.question: Alright, I'll let you go for now, miss you already, you know.
turns.questionKo: 그래, 이제 놔줄게, 벌써 보고 싶다, 알지.
turns.answer: Miss you too, talk again soon, I promise.
turns.answerKo: 나도 보고 싶어, 곧 다시 얘기하자, 약속할게.

turns.question: I have to go now, but this call really meant a lot to me.
turns.questionKo: 나 이제 가야 하는데, 이번 통화 정말 큰 의미였어.
turns.answer: Same here, thank you so much for calling.

turns.question: Of course. Okay, stay well, and give everyone my love, alright?
turns.questionKo: 당연하지. 그래, 건강하게 지내고, 다들에게 안부 전해줘, 알았지?
turns.answer: I will, take care of yourself too, bye for now.
turns.answerKo: 그럴게, 너도 몸 잘 챙기고, 일단 안녕.
